medialive.channel.nielsenwatermarkssetti:
Settings to configure Nielsen Watermarks in the audio encode.

The parent of this entity is AudioWatermarkSettings.

medialive.channel.nielsenwatermarkssetti.Description: Complete these fields only if you want to insert watermarks of type Nielsen CBET
Choose the distribution types that you want to assign to the watermarks: - PROGRAM_CONTENT - FINAL_DISTRIBUTOR
Complete these fields only if you want to insert watermarks of type Nielsen NAES II (N2) and Nielsen NAES VI (NW).
